name: Mango Sorbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Simple syrups are made from 1 cup water and 1 cup sugar mixed together.
2. Strain the mango puree through a chinois (sieve).
3. Add the simple syrup and lime juice to the strained mango puree.
4. Using an ice cream maker, churn and chill until frozen.
Simple syrups are made from equal parts water and sugar.
